description_long: This house is a rectangular, single-family residence surrounded by a dense perimeter of snow-dusted evergreen trees, creating a secluded and private yard. The main structure features a central, two-story section with a gabled roof, flanked by single-story wings on either side. The exterior appears to be clad in light gray stone or brick, with a symmetrical arrangement of windows on the front facade. The property includes a large, open grassy area within the tree boundary, and the rear of the house has a similar symmetrical design. The entryway is centrally located, marked by a prominent door and a small set of steps, but lacks a porch or overhang. The overall design is simple and traditional, with a focus on symmetry and privacy.
description: A symmetrical, two-story stone house with single-story wings, surrounded by snow-covered evergreen trees and a large grassy yard. The design is traditional and private, with a central entryway and gabled roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central entryway, symmetrical wings, and dense tree border.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the two-story central section, single-story wings, and open grassy yard.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with symmetrical layout and tree enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view highlighting the central gabled section and surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with small steps, no porch or overhang, simple and unadorned
